Responsibilities & Context Job Summary: The ESG & Community Relations Manager will lead the company’s Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) initiatives across Bangladesh operations. The role will build strong relationships with communities, government authorities and stakeholders, ensure regulatory compliance and ethical standards, and coordinate ESG activities with Chinese management and HQ teams. Key Responsibilities: Community & Stakeholder Engagement: - Serve as liaison with local communities, NGOs and stakeholders. - Implement community investment programs and manage grievance mechanisms. Government & Regulatory Affairs: - Maintain communication with government authorities and ensure regulatory compliance. - Monitor regulatory changes and manage required documentation. Vocational Education Partnership: - Coordinate vocational training initiatives with local institutes and authorities. Manage enrollment, curriculum coordination and trainee progress tracking. Environmental Management: - Support environmental data collection (energy, water, waste, emissions) for ESG reporting. - Promote green initiatives and assist with environmental audits. Compliance & Anti-Corruption: - Promote ethical practices and ensure adherence to anti-corruption policies. - Monitor donations and external payments for transparency and compliance. - Conduct staff awareness sessions on compliance and ethics. Reporting & Communication: - Prepare ESG reports, case studies, and internal communications. Coordinate data and updates with HQ ESG teams. Program Implementation Unit (PIU), BPI-SICIP Scheme Name: Expansion of Skills for Employment and Socially Inclusive Training for Priority and Emerging Sectors IMPORTANT FOR APPLICANT: Bangladesh Petroleum Institute (BPI) invites applications from eligible Bangladeshi nationals for recruitment on a contractual basis under the Program Implementation Unit (PIU) of the Skills for Industry Competitiveness and Innovation Program (SICIP), in accordance with the approved Business Plan (BP) and program guidelines. Program Implementation Unit (PIU) for BPI-SICIP Key Responsibilities: Ensure appropriate selection, enrolment, assessment, and completion of trainees in line with approved Business Plan targets, with special emphasis on women and disadvantaged groups. Support Training Institutes (TIs) in implementing training programs in accordance with approved Business Plans, MoUs, competency standards, and learning materials Monitor and ensure achievement of job placement targets as set in the Business Plan. Maintain and regularly update trainee and employment data (placement, wage, employment status) using SICIP-provided trainee management software. Develop and maintain strong linkages with employers and industry to enhance employment opportunities for graduates. Coordinate closely with job placement focal persons at Training Institutes. Support trainees in CV preparation, interview readiness, and industry exposure visits. Prepare and submit regular job placement reports including wage levels and employment status. Organize job fairs, employer meetings, and industry engagement events as per the Business Plan. Perform any other duties assigned by the Chief Coordinator and the Skills Development Coordination and Monitoring Unit (SDCMU) for effective program implementation. job_title: Remote Video Editor (DaVinci Resolve) - Sports & Social Media
job_description:
Remote Video Editor (DaVinci Resolve) - Sports & Social Media : Hopper Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Hopper Remote Video Editor (DaVinci Resolve) - Sports & Social Media Application Deadline : 09 Apr 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 01 Location: Anywhere in Bangladesh Salary: Tk. 18000 - 20000 (Monthly) Published: 10 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements To ensure a smooth workflow with DaVinci Resolve, you must meet the following hardware and software specs: Software: Proven expertise in DaVinci Resolve (Studio version preferred). RAM: Minimum 32 GB of high-speed RAM. Storage: Must have at least a 1TB External SSD for active project management and cache. Internet: A stable, high-speed connection (Minimum 100 Mbps) for downloading raw footage and uploading 4K/HQ exports. Experience: At least 5 social media posts (Reels/TikTok/Shorts) published before the end of 2025. Note: These must be live links. New edits created specifically for this application will not be accepted. Optional / Nice to Have Ownership of DaVinci Resolve Studio (Paid version). Experience editing fast-paced sports or action-heavy content. Responsibilities & Context About the Role We are looking for a highly skilled and technically equipped DaVinci Resolve Video Editor** to join our team. This role focuses on high-quality sports and social media content where color grading, smooth playback, and precise technical execution are key. We need someone who doesn't just "edit" but understands the workflow of professional-grade software to deliver polished, short-form content. Responsibilities Edit high-energy short-form videos exclusively using DaVinci Resolve. Execute advanced music syncing, rhythmic cutting, and creative transitions. Perform color correction and grading to give sports footage a professional look. Manage large high-bitrate files efficiently using your local hardware. Deliver edits on schedule and implement feedback with precision. Skills & Expertise Adobe After Effects Adobe Premiere Pro DaVinci Resolve Suggested by Video Editing Editing Compensation & Other Benefits Fully Remote: Work from the comfort of your own setup.
Flexibility: Manage your own hours as long as deadlines are met.
Long-term Growth: Opportunity for consistent, long-term collaboration.
Sports Broadcasting: Experience in sports broadcasting industry. Workplace Work from home Employment Status Contractual Job Location Anywhere in Bangladesh Read Before Apply Important: Applications without verifiable social media links or those not meeting the hardware requirements will not be reviewed.

job_description: CCQC - (Knit Garments) : A Leading Knit Garments Group of Companies Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List A Leading Knit Garments Group of Companies CCQC - (Knit Garments) Application Deadline : 31 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 01 Age: 25 to 35 years Location: Dhaka (Uttara) Salary: Tk. 30000 - 35000 (Monthly) Experience: 4 to 8 years Published: 10 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Bachelor/Honors Masters CC QC Certification is a must Experience 4 to 8 years The applicants should have experience in the following business area(s): Garments Additional Requirements Age 25 to 35 years Only Male 4–6 years experience in knit garments quality control. Context সিমুড বাংলাদেশের সর্বাধুনিক এবং সরকারি বিশ্ববিদ্যালয় কর্তৃক একমাত্র এফিলিয়েটেড আল্ট্রাসাউন্ড প্রশিক্ষণ কেন্দ্র।ন্যূনতম এমবিবিএস ডিগ্রীধারী ডাক্তার বৃন্দ আল্ট্রাসাউন্ডের উপর বিভিন্ন কোর্স সম্পন্ন করেন। কাজের সময় ও প্রধান দায়িত্ব: প্রতিদিন সকাল ৮:৩০ টা থেকে বিকাল ৫:০০ টা পর্যন্ত বিভিন্ন মেডিকেল কলেজে ইন্টার্ন চিকিৎসক এবং হাসপাতালে কর্মরত চিকিৎসকদের সঙ্গে সরাসরি সাক্ষাৎ করে সিমুডে পরিচালিত আল্ট্রাসাউন্ড কোর্স সম্পর্কে তথ্য প্রচার ও মার্কেটিং করতে হবে। কোর্সের সুবিধা, কারিকুলাম এবং ক্যারিয়ারের সম্ভাবনা তুলে ধরে আগ্রহীদের আকৃষ্ট করতে হবে। দৈনিক রিপোর্টিং বাধ্যবাধকতা: প্রতিদিনের কার্যক্রমের বিস্তারিত রিপোর্ট জমা দিতে হবে, যাতে সাক্ষাৎকৃত ব্যক্তিদের সংখ্যা, তাদের প্রতিক্রিয়া, সম্ভাব্য ভর্তির সম্ভাবনা এবং মার্কেটিং কার্যক্রমের অগ্রগতি উল্লেখ থাকবে। রিপোর্ট নির্ধারিত সময়ের মধ্যে নির্দিষ্ট ফরম্যাটে জমা দিতে হবে। মাসিক ভর্তির টার্গেট অর্জন: প্রতি মাসে আল্ট্রাসাউন্ড কোর্সে মেডিকেল শিক্ষার্থী ও চিকিৎসকদের ভর্তির জন্য নির্ধারিত টার্গেট পূরণ করতে হবে। টার্গেট অর্জনে ব্যর্থতা কর্মক্ষমতা মূল্যায়নের উপর প্রভাব ফেলতে পারে। টার্গেট ফিলআপ করতে না পারলে এক্সট্রা টাইম মার্কেটিং করে টার্গেট পূরণ করতে হবে। এক্ষেত্রে, সিমুড কোন প্রকার ভর্তুকি প্রদান করবে না। পেশাদার ও নৈতিক আচরণ: মার্কেটিংয়ের সময় চিকিৎসক এবং শিক্ষার্থীদের সঙ্গে পেশাদার, সৌজন্যমূলক এবং নৈতিক আচরণ বজায় রাখতে হবে। কোর্স সম্পর্কে সঠিক, স্বচ্ছ এবং আকর্ষণীয় তথ্য প্রদান করতে হবে, যাতে কোনো ভুল তথ্য বা অতিরঞ্জিত প্রতিশ্রুতি দেওয়া না হয়। কর্মক্ষেত্রে নমনীয়তা ও সৃজনশীলতা: প্রয়োজনে নির্ধারিত এলাকার বাইরে অন্যান্য মেডিকেল কলেজ বা হাসপাতালে ভ্রমণ করতে হবে। মার্কেটিং কার্যক্রমে সৃজনশীল পন্থা অবলম্বন করে সম্ভাব্য শিক্ষার্থীদের আকৃষ্ট করতে হবে, যেমন সেমিনার আয়োজন, প্রেজেন্টেশন বা তথ্য বিতরণের মাধ্যমে। ট্রেনিং ও উপকরণ: মার্কেটিংয়ের জন্য প্রয়োজনীয় প্রশিক্ষণ ও উপকরণ (যেমন, লিফলেট, বই, প্রেজেন্টেশন) Problem solving & decision-making skills within the shortest possible time. Possess excellent communication, presentation and interpersonal skill. Able to work under pressure in a team with responsibility.   Candidate working or having worked in Hospital management will get preference. Ability to work well under strict deadlines. Responsibilities & Context Application is invited from the qualified and experienced candidates for the position of HR Executive on prevailing terms and conditions of USTC Job Responsibilities To prepare job descriptions for faculty and administrative positions. To post job advertisements and manage applications. To assist in shortlisting candidates and coordinate interviews with department heads. To assist in hiring faculty members and staff. To handle employee grievances and complaints. To maintain positive work relationships between management and employees. To support disciplinary procedures when necessary. To maintain proper employee documentation and HR records. To prepare HR reports for top management. To execute any other assignment as and when required by the competent authority. Head of Internal Control and Compliance (ICC) Application Deadline : 23 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: -- Age: 32 to 40 years Location: Anywhere in Bangladesh Salary: Negotiable Published: 10 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 32 to 40 years Responsibilities & Context Ensure reliability, accuracy, completeness, and timeliness of financial and management circular information across the organization. Ensure full compliance with finance company act 2023, applicable laws, regulations, Bangladesh Bank guidelines, and internal policies. Develop and implement the Annual Internal Audit Plan, covering all departments, subject to approval by the Audit Committee of the Board. Conduct and supervise internal audits as per the approved audit plan and ensure effective implementation of audit recommendations. Monitor compliance with internal audit observations, regulatory findings, and management directives. Ensure timely preparation and submission of regulatory reports to Bangladesh Bank and other relevant authorities. Conduct pre-audit of loan files exceeding BDT 1 crore prior to disbursement as per Bangladesh Bank requirements. Conduct post-sanction compliance review of Home Loan and Retail Loan files to ensure documentation accuracy and regulatory compliance. Coordinate and maintain effective liaison with External Auditors, Special Audit Teams, and Bangladesh Bank inspection officials. Prepare and submit monthly loan statements to Bangladesh Bank and MIS reports to the Board of Directors and Management. Document weekly meeting minutes and monitor follow-up actions for compliance. Support management in strengthening internal control systems and risk management practices. Perform any other responsibilities assigned by management from time to time. Responsibilities & Context We are looking for a dynamic and experienced General Manager in the field of HR, Admin & Compliance . Job Location will be Gazipur . Full responsibility of HR, Admin & Compliance Department of multiple factories in the same premises. Developing and implementing HR & Compliance strategies in line with the Business Plan, Labor Law, Buyers` COC, Industry standards, etc. Ensure Labor Law, Buyer code of conduct & other rules and regulations. Prepare and update policy / procedure / SOP for HR & Compliance. Handling factory recruitment procedure, joining, confirmation, promotion, transfer, compensation & benefits, attendance, leave management, training & development, disciplinary actions, employee relations, grievance handling, etc. Prepare the factory for facing different audits such as social, environmental, technical, security audits, etc. Ensure the factory’ working environments are in accordance with social compliance standards, BSCI, WRAP, SEDEX, OHSAS, Accord Alliance and QMS audit as per buyer / customer standards and requirements. To take corrective action and monitor all corrective measures as advised by the management / buyer / compliance auditors. Conducts regular inspections of facilities, worksites, equipment, work practices, and safety devices to ensure compliance with required workplace standards, regulations, and policies. Responsible for ensuring a healthy workplace, and maintaining efficient operation of safety, hygiene, and environment. Monitor the implementation status of the Corrective Action Plan and the Welfare and Safety of the employee. Establish and maintain a peaceful Industrial Relationship between management and workers. Development of proper systems for maintaining and monitoring appropriate disciplinary action procedures among staff and workers. Handle grievances of workers
